description_long: This rifle features a striking red and black patterned finish across its entire body, giving it a modern and aggressive appearance. The main body is streamlined with a prominent barrel and a compact, ergonomic grip. The stock is integrated into the rear of the weapon, appearing fixed and solid, while the magazine is housed just in front of the trigger guard, blending seamlessly into the design. The rifle is equipped with simple iron sights mounted on the top rail, and the muzzle end features a visible device, likely a compensator or muzzle brake. The overall construction suggests a robust metal frame with some polymer components, designed for durability and ease of handling in urban environments.
description: A modern rifle with a vivid red and black finish, featuring a fixed stock, iron sights, and a streamlined, robust design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the fixed stock, grip, and barrel with a visible muzzle device.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular muzzle and the alignment of the iron sights along the top rail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine area, trigger, and the continuous red and black pattern.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock and the back of the receiver, with the grip and trigger visible below.
